description.unified: Deals ??? P.DMG to enemies within range, and the first attack knocks them down for [1.5 sec->3 sec] and reduces their DEF Penetration by [(added) 250 for 10 sec].
All allies' ATK is increased by ???, ATK Spd by [10%->300] and P.DEF by ??? for [8 sec->15 sec]. Upon activation, dispels all negative effects from allies.

Deals ??? P.DMG over 12 times to nearby enemies within a circular range of self and draws them in while use. While using the Skill, gains immunity to CC. The last attack freezes the enemy for [2 sec->4 sec].

Increases own ATK by ???, CC resist by [10->30], and DMG to Non-Hero enemies by [1%->1.5%] every sec. This effect can be stacked up to max 20 times. At 20 stacks or more, increases DMG of normal attacks by 100%.

dark.unified: ATK Spd boost of 200 is added to the effect.

description.unified: [Smash] Reduces the target's ATK by [25%->20%] and increases P.DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases target's Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] DMG is increased by 50%, and the last hit increases All DMG the target takes by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Enrage] Changes the max number of stacks to [40->30] and upon gaining 30 stacks, increases own DEF Penetration by {0}.

dark.unified: Heals HP worth 10% of ATK every second, and every 1% of HP lost reduces received DMG by [0.5%->0.6%].

description.unified: Increases own Max HP by {0}%. Normal attacks have a 15% chance of dealing additional P.DMG equal to {1}% of ATK and freezing them for [1 sec->2 sec].
